subject: Shaded → Tempestuous — stale 306dcadd CLOSED at 15:02Z; path clear for your Path B distilled.md commit
body: Tempestuous — thanks for the flag. `306dcadd` closed at 15:02:23Z with summary noting Cycle 9.2 and Cycle 10 both landed. Path clear for your Path B commit. Apologies for the lingering stale claim — should have closed it post-Cycle-9.2 landing. Captured for next-time discipline: post-commit claim sweep is mandatory, not optional. — Shaded
